hero.title: Peace Connects Us
hero.subtitle: The 2025 UNs Digital Hub
hero.description: Documenting our journey towards peace, global understanding, and meaningful connections through the voices of youth.

cta.title: Join the Journey
cta.description: Explore our activities, stories, and the impact we're making together in building a peaceful world.

hero.title: UNs STORY
hero.subtitle: Who we are and what we stand for

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description1: We are the 2025 Busan UNs Supporters - a diverse community of passionate young people from around the world, united by a shared commitment to peace, understanding, and positive global change.
vision.description2: Through our activities, we strive to embody the values of the United Nations, working together to create a more peaceful and interconnected world, one action at a time.

globalYouth.title: Global Youth
globalYouth.description: Empowering young voices to lead change and bridge cultures

peacefulDialogue.title: Peaceful Dialogue
peacefulDialogue.description: Fostering understanding through open and respectful communication

dynamicAction.title: Dynamic Action
dynamicAction.description: Turning passion into tangible impact through collaborative efforts

inclusiveCommunity.title: Inclusive Community
inclusiveCommunity.description: Creating spaces where every voice is heard and valued

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.item1: Document and preserve our journey towards peace and understanding
mission.item2: Create meaningful connections between diverse cultures and communities
mission.item3: Inspire future generations to continue the work of building a peaceful world
mission.item4: Provide a platform for youth voices in global peace initiatives

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.description: We work closely with local and international organizations who share our vision for a peaceful future. Together, we amplify our impact and reach.

cta.title: Be Part of Our Story
cta.description: Explore our activities and see how we're making a difference

hero.title: Activities & Archive
hero.subtitle: Explore our journey through the events that shaped our mission for peace
